recommendation_context: review filters and execution thresholds because the runner is failing to convert opportunities
improve model quality and data coverage before promoting this family
tighten entry logic and retrain for better trade selection quality

maintenance_request.reason: Latest paper evaluation is not promotable under the current policy. The dominant failure mode is execution and gating invalidity, not simple model staleness: ROI is negative, failure_rate is 1.0, slippage headroom is materially negative, regime robustness is below minimum, and two related targets are rejecting 100% of opportunities with zero simulated fills. The only branch that does trade still loses money and is blocked on concentration and strict-gate issues.

retrain.target_objective: reduce missed settlement windows while improving strict-gate pass rate on funding dislocations
